title: Opinion: The Rural Health Transformation Program could fail patients like mine
description: Maintaining the capacity to provide care close to home for rural patients is critical, but it’s under threat.
content: Maintaining the capacity to provide care close to home for rural patients is critical, but it’s under threat.
